backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing a placement portal with company, job posting, student profile, and application management using access control mixins and blob storage, with role-based permissions for admin and user operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the removal of unwanted animation effects from the login page, referencing LoginButton.tsx and index.css with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated summaries of frontend files describing React components for a placement portal including dashboard, job listings, applications, admin panel, and authentication with layout shift prevention measures.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode CSS variables for a professional placement portal theme with neutral, primary, and accent colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the AI-based personalized treatment recommendation system with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for dashboard, job details, application flow, admin panel, and profile pages, wrapped in QueryClientProvider with Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied screen component displaying a shield alert icon, error message for unauthorized admin page access, and navigation button to return to dashboard.
frontend/src/components/admin/Applicatio: Admin component for viewing and managing student job applications with status updates. Currently shows placeholder UI noting that applications will appear once students apply.
frontend/src/components/admin/CompanyMan: Admin component for adding and viewing companies with a dialog form for creating new company entries (name, industry, location) and a table displaying existing companies.
frontend/src/components/admin/JobPosting: Admin component for creating and managing job postings with a dialog form that collects company, title, description, skills, CGPA, branches, salary range, and logo URL.
frontend/src/components/ApplicationHisto: Card component displaying job application details including company name, job title, submission date, and color-coded status badge with formatted timestamp.
frontend/src/components/EligibilityCheck: Component that validates and displays student eligibility for a job by checking CGPA, branch requirements, and skill matches with visual indicators and detailed breakdown.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with copyright notice, caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking, and institutional placement disclaimer text.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Navigation header component with logo, title, and conditional navigation buttons (Dashboard, Profile, Admin) based on authentication and user role. Includes LoginButton and uses Internet Identity for auth.
frontend/src/components/JobCard.tsx: Displays a job posting card with company info, salary range, required skills, and eligibility badge based on student's CGPA and branch. Navigates to job detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout with loading states. Clears query cache on logout and handles authentication errors.
Root layout component that wraps pages with Header, main content area with gradient background, and Footer using React Router's Outlet.
frontend/src/components/ProfileCompletio: Displays profile completion progress with percentage, progress bar, and list of missing fields (name, email, CGPA, branch, skills, resume, bio). Shows completion badge when 100%.
frontend/src/components/StudentProfileCa: Displays student profile information including name, email, CGPA, branch, skills, bio, and resume link with an edit button to navigate to profile edit page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializing access control with admin token and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminOperations.ts: Provides mutation hooks for admin operations including adding companies, adding job postings, and updating application status with toast notifications and query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and providing login/logout functionality with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useJobApplication.ts: Mutation hook for students to apply for jobs, handling submission, query invalidation, and toast notifications for success/error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching data including user role, companies, job postings, applied jobs, and individual job applications.
frontend/src/hooks/useStudentDashboard.t: Combines student profile, job postings, and applications data, filtering jobs based on student's CGPA and branch eligibility.
frontend/src/hooks/useStudentProfile.ts: Manages student profile CRUD operations with query and mutation hooks, including profile completion calculation based on filled fields.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme color palettes using OKLCH color space and utility classes for grid patterns.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient provider and InternetIdentity provider wrapping the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page with role-based access control, displaying tabbed interface for managing companies, job postings, and applications.
frontend/src/pages/ApplicationFlow.tsx: Multi-step job application flow page that checks student eligibility (GPA and branch), displays confirmation UI, and handles application submission with success feedback.
frontend/src/pages/JobDetails.tsx: Detailed job posting view page showing company info, salary, location, eligibility requirements, and application status with conditional apply button.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileEdit.tsx: Student profile editing form with fields for personal info, CGPA, branches, skills (with tag management), resume link, and bio, including profile completion indicator.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetup.tsx: Initial profile creation form for new students with required fields (name, email, CGPA, branches) and optional fields (skills, resume, bio).
frontend/src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx: Main student dashboard displaying profile card, filterable job listings (by search term and CTC range), and application history with authentication checks and profile setup prompts.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and methods to clear sensitive parameters from the URL.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, custom shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file for PlacementPro Student Portal tracking implemented features (student dashboard, job applications, admin views, profile management) and a known issue with unwanted login page animation effects.
